products.description: 🔨 Universal Titanium eNail 🔨 Completely universal titanium nail — fits 10mm, 14mm, and 18mm joints, both male and female. One nail for any rig or attachment. eNail compatible. Current price: $19.70.

products.name: 4 Pack Replacement Ceramic Donut Coils (not for V4) 7mm
products.description: 4-Pack Ceramic Donut Coils (7mm) Replacement 7mm ceramic donut coils in 1.5ohm and 0.8ohm for your RDA atomizer. Compatible with the Kiln RA. Not for V3/V4 models. Current price: $12.12.
